positive: A vibrant, highly stylized cosmic forest landscape, rendered in a detailed, intricate low-poly vector art style. The central composition features ancient, stylized trees with glowing, geometric foliage, interconnected by floating crystalline pathways. The palette emphasizes deep sapphire blues, vibrant emerald greens, and pops of bioluminescent gold and magenta. The aesthetic should evoke a dreamlike, celestial jungle at twilight. Focus on clean, thick lines, strong silhouettes, and high contrast against a dark, starry nebula background. Graphic novel illustration, symmetry, ethereal glow, mystical, suitable for apparel printing, highly detailed.
negative: blur, artifacts, jpeg artifacts, low detail, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, sloppy, poor composition, realistic, photo, grainy, messy
